_readme: KPI goal table for the Scorecard - the committed fallback.
Once build/scorecard-goals.gs is deployed to the shared Apps Script
store, managers edit goals there and those values override this file.
Keys match the metric keys in scorecard_live.ROLES[role]['metrics'].
A metric with no entry here simply shows no goal on the scorecard.
Goal semantics: rates/averages are thresholds the period value is held
against; counts and dollars are ANNUAL goals paced by elapsed year.
